articles.description: The LDF, the UDF and the NDA are locked in three-cornered fights in the constituencies of Nemom, Kazhakkoottam, Vattiyoorkkavu, Aranmula, Pala, Thrissur, Nattika, Palakkad and Manjeshwaram. The outcomes from these seats could even determine the final outcome of the polls.

dailyNews.title: Iran-US war impacted ‘fertilisers, steel and aluminum’ the most, says Saudi Arabia Finance Minister
dailyNews.description: Saudi Arabia’s Finance Minister Al-Jadaan said that while oil has dominated media coverage, it is refined products – including fertilisers, steel and aluminum – that have been most affected due to the ongoing war.

dailyNews.title: Trump declares national emergency at airports, will sign order instructing DHS to 'immediately pay' TSA agents
dailyNews.description: President announces forthcoming executive order to have DHS pay TSA agents during shutdown, citing airport chaos and blaming Democrats in a Truth Social post.

dailyNews.title: Treasury to place Trump’s signature on paper currency to mark nation's 250th anniversary
dailyNews.description: Trump's signature will appear on U.S. dollar bills, the Treasury Department said, marking the first time in 165 years a president's name will appear on currency.

dailyNews.title: Fox News Poll: Sour voters say Washington is out of touch
dailyNews.description: A new national poll finds Trump's disapproval hits a second-term high of 59%, and his inflation approval dropped to 28% as voter pessimism grows.

dailyNews.title: Trump pauses Iran energy plant strikes for 10 days as talks ‘going very well’
dailyNews.description: President paused planned Iran energy plant strikes for 10 days, citing ongoing talks and setting a new April 6 deadline as Operation Epic Fury continues.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Will Sign Order to Pay T.S.A. Agents as Travel Frustrations Grow
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he would sign an emergency order to pay Transportation Security Administration agents, with an intensifying crisis at airports ahead of a busy travel weekend.

dailyNews.title: Trump Administration Begins Investigations Into Three Medical Schools
dailyNews.description: The Justice Department’s demands for admissions-related data from Stanford, Ohio State and the University of California, San Diego, represent a flex of federal power.

dailyNews.title: Trump Eyes White House Treaty Room for Latest Renovation Project
dailyNews.description: President Trump is making new plans in one of the most significant renovations in the history of the White House.

dailyNews.title: G.O.P. Senator Weighs Forcing Congress to Vote to Authorize the Iran War
dailyNews.description: Senator Lisa Murkowski of Alaska is drafting a formal authorization for the use of military force in Iran, seeking to put some parameters around the operation as the Trump administration has boxed out Congress.

dailyNews.title: Trump Defends His Use of Mail-In Voting: ‘Because I’m President’
dailyNews.description: President Trump wants to restrict voting by mail, which he says amounts to “cheating.” But he defended his own use of the practice in a special election this week.

dailyNews.title: Trump says he'll order DHS to start paying TSA officers as shutdown drags on
dailyNews.description: President Trump said he will sign an executive order to restart pay for TSA officers, who have gone more than a month without a full paycheck.

dailyNews.title: Witkoff floats Iran peace proposal as Trump extends pause on energy plant strikes
dailyNews.description: President Trump on Thursday extended a pause on striking Iranian energy infrastructure until April 6.
